summary: Tested product image upload functionality. Backend API (POST /api/upload/image) works correctly - 8/8 tests passed. CRITICAL ISSUE: ProductsManager.jsx component with image upload UI is NOT accessible from admin dashboard. The admin dashboard uses UnifiedProductsManager for 'Bundles' which manages BBQ products without image support. Homepage products (151 items) all have placeholder images.

integration_issues.issue: ProductsManager.jsx component (with image upload UI) is imported in AdminDashboard.jsx but NEVER rendered. No menu item or route exposes this component.

issues: All 151 products display placeholder images (/api/placeholder/400/300) instead of real product images - appears as dark/empty boxes

action_items: CRITICAL: Add ProductsManager to admin dashboard - either as new menu item or replace UnifiedProductsManager for product management with images
Update AdminDashboard.jsx to include a 'Products' menu item that renders ProductsManager component
Consider adding image field to UnifiedProductsManager/BBQ products if they should also have images
Update existing products in database with real image URLs (currently all have placeholder URLs)
critical_code_review_comments: ProductsManager.jsx is imported (line 9) but never used in AdminDashboard.jsx renderContent() switch statement
Two separate product systems exist: /api/products (151 items with images) and /api/bbq-products (16 items without images)
Image upload endpoint POST /api/upload/image works correctly but is inaccessible from admin UI
handleImageUpload in ProductsManager.jsx is now properly called in handleSubmit (line 82-90) - this fix is correct
seed_data_creation: Test products created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend image upload API works. Main issue is frontend - ProductsManager.jsx needs to be added to admin dashboard menu. Current admin 'Bundles' section uses UnifiedProductsManager which manages BBQ products without image support.

details: POST /api/upload/image accepts image files and returns URL
POST /api/products creates product with image URL
GET /api/products returns products with image field
ProductsManager.jsx component exists with image upload UI
Component is imported but NOT rendered in admin dashboard
No menu item to access ProductsManager
All products have placeholder image URLs

root_cause_analysis.issue: Product images showing as broken/placeholder on homepage
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: ProductsManager.jsx (with image upload functionality) is not accessible from admin dashboard. Admin can only manage BBQ products via UnifiedProductsManager which has no image field.
reproduction_steps: 2. Look for Products management - only 'Bundles' available which uses UnifiedProductsManager
3. UnifiedProductsManager has no image upload field
4. ProductsManager.jsx exists but is not rendered anywhere
5. Homepage products from /api/products all have placeholder images
root_cause_analysis.fix_recommendation: Add 'Products' menu item to AdminDashboard.jsx that renders ProductsManager component, allowing admin to manage products with images
